lines.english: Lesson 101
lines.raw: Lesson 101 | 第101课

lines.english: A card from Jimmy
lines.raw: A card from Jimmy | 吉米的明信片

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: Does grandmother seem pleased to get a card from Jimmy? Why/Why not?
lines.chinese: 奶奶收到吉米的明信片似乎很高兴吗？为什么/为什么不？
lines.raw: Does grandmother seem pleased to get a card from Jimmy? Why/Why not? | 奶奶收到吉米的明信片似乎很高兴吗？为什么/为什么不？

lines.english: Read Jimmy's card to me please, Penny.
lines.chinese: 请把吉米的明信片读给我听，潘妮。
lines.raw: Read Jimmy's card to me please, Penny. | 请把吉米的明信片读给我听，潘妮。

lines.english: 'I have just arrived in Scotland and I'm staying at a Youth Hostel.'
lines.chinese: “我刚到苏格兰，住在青年旅社。”
lines.raw: 'I have just arrived in Scotland and I'm staying at a Youth Hostel.' | “我刚到苏格兰，住在青年旅社。”

lines.english: Eh?
lines.raw: Eh? | 嗯？

lines.english: He says he's just arrived in Scotland.
lines.raw: He says he's just arrived in Scotland. | 他说他刚到苏格兰。

lines.english: He says he's staying at a Youth Hostel.
lines.raw: He says he's staying at a Youth Hostel. | 他说他住在青年旅社。

lines.english: You know he's a member of the Y.H.A.
lines.chinese: 你知道他是青年旅社协会的成员。
lines.raw: You know he's a member of the Y.H.A. | 你知道他是青年旅社协会的成员。

lines.english: The what?
lines.raw: The what? | 什么？

lines.english: The Y.H.A., Mum.
lines.raw: The Y.H.A., Mum. | 青年旅社协会，妈妈。

lines.english: The Youth Hostels Association.
lines.raw: The Youth Hostels Association. | 青年旅社协会。

lines.english: What else does he say?
lines.raw: What else does he say? | 他还说了些什么？

lines.english: 'I'll write a letter soon.
lines.raw: 'I'll write a letter soon. | “我很快会写信的。

lines.english: I hope you are all well.'
lines.raw: I hope you are all well.' | 希望你们都好。”

lines.english: What? Speak up, Penny.
lines.raw: What? Speak up, Penny. | 什么？大声点，潘妮。

lines.english: I'm afraid I can't hear you.
lines.chinese: 我恐怕听不清你说什么。
lines.raw: I'm afraid I can't hear you. | 我恐怕听不清你说什么。

lines.english: He says he'll write a letter soon.
lines.raw: He says he'll write a letter soon. | 他说他很快会写信。

lines.english: He hopes we are all well.
lines.raw: He hopes we are all well. | 他希望我们都好。

lines.english: 'Love, Jimmy.'
lines.raw: 'Love, Jimmy.' | “爱你的，吉米。”

lines.english: Is that all?
lines.raw: Is that all? | 就这些吗？

lines.english: He doesn't say very much, does he?
lines.raw: He doesn't say very much, does he? | 他没说多少，是吧？

lines.english: He can't write very much on a card, Mum.
lines.chinese: 他在明信片上写不了很多，妈妈。
lines.raw: He can't write very much on a card, Mum. | 他在明信片上写不了很多，妈妈。
